都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #Recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

우리 신안철거가 수도권 철거 1등이야~~!!! 안녕하세요! 철거하는 50대 아조씨입니다!!🙋‍♂️ 만약 철거업체를 구하고 계시는 분들이라면, 아래 저희 [신안철거 소개글]을 읽어주시고 제 [프로필 링크]도 한번씩 방문해보셨으면 좋겠습니다!💕 저희 [신안철거]에 대한 정보뿐만 아니라, 자영업자와 소상공인분들이 도움되실 수 있는 정보까지 모두 적어놓았습니다! 항상 감사합니다!!☺️ - 안녕하세요. #철거 하는 50대 아조씨, 신안철거 대표 조성철입니다! 저희 #신안철거 는 서울/경기/인천 수도권 전지역 철거를 하고 있는데요! 2026년 자영업 소상공인만 무려 600만명인 시대에 약 10곳 중 8곳은 3년 이내로 폐업하는 현실, 그로 인해 철거 업체는 더더욱 많아지고 있지만 좋은 철거 업체는 점점 줄어들고 있는 현실, 그래서 저희 신안철거는 어떻게 하면 더 좋은 철거업체가 되어 가장 먼저 발벗고 나서 도울 수 있을까 생각하며 오늘도 열심히 철거 현장에 나서고 있습니다. 특히나 철거, 폐기물 처리 작업은 최소 비용이 수십, 수천만원이 기본 단위이기 때문에 #철거업체 를 찾고 계시는 분들은 어떤 철거 업체를 써야 하는지, 철거를 할 때 알아야 하는 정보들은 정확히 무엇인지 몰라 고민하거나, 이미 철거 업체와 작업을 했는데 업체를 잘못 선택해서 후회하시는 분들이 정말 많은데요. 앞으로 저희 신안철거가 직접 나서서 도와드리도록 노력하려고, 조금 어렵지만 많은 분들이 볼 수 있게 SNS라는 걸 직접 시작하게 됐습니다. 📣 만약 철거 업체를 찾고 있는데 어떤 업체를 해야 하나 고민이신 분들은, 🔗 제 프로필 링크에 저희 신안철거에 대한 모든 정보와 철거에 대한 도움되는 정보까지 모두 적어놓았으니 꼭 읽어봐주시면 감사드리겠습니다! 무료 현장 방문을 통해 가장 합리적인 비용으로 견적을 내어드리고, 불필요한 추가 비용은 요구하지 않는 정직한 철거 업체, 신안철거가 되겠습니다. 서울 / 경기 / 인천 수도권 철거는 <신안철거> @sinancheolgeo_official 친절 상담 / 무료 현장 방문 / 가장 합리적인 견적 / 민원 발생 ZERO 도전! (영상에 나오는 제가 직접 상담, 무료 현장 방문합니다!) #신안철거 팔로우 해주시고 앞으로도 자주 뵈어요. 감사합니다!😊

spoiler: it took longer than an hour and I spent more than £70… but I still kinda loved it? 👀💄✨ I tried the £70 Charlotte Tilbury makeover before a wedding and here’s a lil honest review…  Yes, the makeup was stunning and lasted ALL night. Yes, the £70 is redeemable on products. But no one told me the “1 hour glam” might actually be closer to 2 hours and feel a bit hectic? Complimentary prosecco, beautiful Covent Garden Charlotte Tilbury store, a sprinkle of upselling and the pressure of trusting a stranger with your face… this experience had me feeling everything. But I think I left on a high over all. Who else has had their glam done at CT?  #CharlotteTilbury Charlotte Tilbury Makeover  Wedding Guest Makeup  #GRWM  #WeddingGuest

반세기, 50여년 동안 모든 걸 직접 손으로 만드는 의정부 함흥냉면 📍흥미관  (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 제일시장 다동 63호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/xQNb7Lqr 🧊비빔냉면 9천원 ⏰매일 9시~20시 의정부 제일시장에서 50년 넘는 동안 함흥냉면의 자존심을 지켜오고 있는 ‘흥미관’입니다. ​이곳의 냉면이 특별한 이유는 요즘 시대에 정말 보기 드문 ‘수제 반죽’ 방식을 고집하기 때문인데요.  사장님이 직접 반죽하고 바로 뽑아낸 면발은 기성품과는 차원이 다른 쫄깃하고 탱글한 식감을 자랑합니다. ​특히 육수부터 비빔 양념, 고명에 들어가는 모든 재료를 사장님이 직접 정성으로 만드시는데요.  실제로 먹어보니 과하게 달거나 맵거나 짜지 않고, 모든 맛이 조화롭게 어우러진 깊은 ‘손맛’ 그 자체였습니다! ​날이 점점 더워지고 여름이 다가오니 시원하고 쫄깃한 이 집 냉면이 자꾸만 생각나네요. 진정한 노포의 내공이 담긴 냉면 맛집을 찾으신다면 꼭 한 번 방문해 보세요! - 50 Years of Tradition! The Legendary Handmade Cold Noodles 📍 Heungmigwan, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: Da-dong 63, 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/xQNb7Lqr 🧊 Spicy Mixed Cold Noodles (Bibim-naengmyeon): 9,000 KRW ⏰ Hours: Daily 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM Welcome to 'Heungmigwan,' a place that has proudly preserved the tradition of Hamhung Naengmyeon for over 50 years in Uijeongbu Jeil Market. What makes this place special is its insistence on the "handmade dough" method, which is rare to find these days. The noodles, freshly kneaded and pressed by the owner, boast a chewy and bouncy texture that is on a whole different level from factory-made ones. From the broth to the spicy seasoning and toppings, every ingredient is crafted by hand with great care. The taste is perfectly balanced—not too sweet, spicy, or salty—offering the deep flavor of true craftsmanship. As the days get warmer, you'll find yourself craving these refreshing and chewy noodles. If you're looking for an authentic, time-honored noodle spot, this is it! #서울맛집 #의정부 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral
